description: Fixed multiple issues in the CLI archive verifier build pipeline: removed failing TypeScript and C# starter checks that could not run in the 1ES signed-build agent (both depend on NuGet feeds unreachable from the build agent), added lightweight GitHub CI coverage to catch verifier regressions before they reach the post-merge pipeline, and fixed a latent scope-narrowing bug in the sidecar check that would have silently missed stray sidecars in archives with a top-level directory.
name: Fix CLI archive verifier build break and add GitHub CI coverage
